scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,landing,portal -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:landing" "npm run dev:portal"
scripts.dev:backend: lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 || true && sleep 1 && cd backend/shared_services && python3 -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.build:landing: cd frontend-landing && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
scripts.build:portal: cd frontend-portal && npm install && npm run build
